/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/UTN_INSPT_SFMLProject.dir/src/eventos.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UTN_INSPT_SFMLProject.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UTN_INSPT_SFMLProject.dir/src/rectangle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UTN_INSPT_SFMLProject.dir/src/ventana.cpp.o -o ../bin/UTN_INSPT_SFMLProject  _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-graphics-s-d.a _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-window-s-d.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libX11.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libXrandr.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libXcursor.so _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-system-s-d.a -lpthread -lrt /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libudev.so -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfreetype.so
